texto: What happend to her? To Miranda?'Ulysses shrugged. 'What happens to most children. She got sick, and never got better.''And your wife?''The same.''But you said you were married,' said Will, glancing down at Ulysses's ring, smooth and lustrous in the half-light.'I'll always be married. But it'll be the next world when I see her again.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Cameron Stracher que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “What happend to her? To Miranda?'Ulysses shrugged. 'What happens to most children. She got sick, …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, sad, true-love, com foco em termino e true-love.

texto: Of course Will was right again. But I realized clearly for the first time how desperate our plight was. It has been foolish to think we could rescue Kai. Now, wherever he is, it couldn't be worse than being held captive by pirates. Even cannibals were more trustworthy.
